stages.name: Foundations
stages.description: Core infrastructure — data warehouse, ETL pipelines, BI tool, and a clean dbt modeling layer.

milestones.name: Data Warehouse
milestones.covers: Single source of truth warehouse (Snowflake / BigQuery / Redshift) with all sources connected via Fivetran or custom pipelines

milestones.name: ETL Tool
milestones.covers: Setup a tool to ingest data

milestones.name: BI Tool
milestones.covers: Provision a BI tool to visualize data

milestones.name: Data Modeling (dbt)
milestones.covers: Staging / intermediate / mart layers with naming standards tests and documentation

stages.name: Data Validation
stages.description: Data quality gates — PK uniqueness, revenue integrity, freshness checks, CI/CD triggers, and full documentation.

milestones.name: dbt PK test
milestones.covers: Source freshness validations PK uniqueness and not_null tests composite PKs

milestones.name: dbt Revenue Integrity test
milestones.covers: Revenue integrity test for finance consistency

milestones.name: dbt freshness tests
milestones.covers: Source YML files per staging folder with freshness tests

milestones.name: AI agent code reviewer
milestones.covers: AI-based code review integrated into PR workflow

milestones.name: dbt CI triggers
milestones.covers: dbt Cloud CI job using state:modified+ with GitHub branch protection rules

milestones.name: README & CONTRIBUTING file
milestones.covers: README with onboarding guide and CONTRIBUTING with naming rules and PR checklist

milestones.name: Claude terminal sync
milestones.covers: Claude connected to evaluate commits

milestones.name: dbt documentation
milestones.covers: Descriptions on all undocumented models macros and column-level mart documentation

milestones.name: SQL fluff linter
milestones.covers: SQL linter for consistency across the project with rules in CLAUDE.MD and CONTRIBUTING.md

stages.name: Project Management
stages.description: Team workflows — unified Slack channels, GitHub PR notifications, and Linear × GitHub integration.

milestones.name: #data-alerts channel
milestones.covers: Unified #data-alerts channel plus #ask-data and #data-team Slack channels

milestones.name: GitHub PR channel
milestones.covers: GitHub PR notifications in Slack

milestones.name: #ask-data channel
milestones.covers: #ask-data channel for company-wide ticket submission to Linear triage

milestones.name: Project Management tool × GitHub
milestones.covers: Linear <> GitHub integration with automatic PR sync and branch naming convention

stages.name: AI Readiness
stages.description: Claude integrated across the data stack — Snowflake MCP, team licenses, marketing skills, and project prompts.

milestones.name: Provision Claude Team license
milestones.covers: Claude Team license enabling project-based collaboration with skills MCP connections and documentation

milestones.name: Add table metadata blocks
milestones.covers: Meta blocks in YAML with tags for grain business domain PII and unit

milestones.name: Snowflake × Claude MCP
milestones.covers: AI read-only role AI warehouse service account and Snowflake MCP deployment for Claude to query the data warehouse

milestones.name: Claude Marketing project
milestones.covers: Marketing Analytics Assistant project with system prompt skill and team members added

milestones.name: Interview Marketing team
milestones.covers: Discovery sessions with Marketing team to surface common questions and reports

milestones.name: Claude Marketing team skill
milestones.covers: Claude skill scoped to the data model and business context with pre-built queries for Marketing

milestones.name: Create Claude skill
milestones.covers: Skill with step-by-step workflow for the weekly report

milestones.name: Create Claude project
milestones.covers: Claude project for weekly company status reporting

milestones.name: Update CLAUDE.MD
milestones.covers: CLAUDE.MD updated with all project changes

stages.name: Basic Visibility
stages.description: All spend sources consolidated. Baseline platform metrics in one place.

milestones.name: Paid spend & platform metrics consolidated
milestones.covers: All ad platform spend and metrics (Meta, Google, TikTok, Pinterest, etc.) pulled into one place via API
milestones.deliverable: Marketing performance dashboard with CAC, CPM, ROAS, CPC by channel

milestones.name: Marketing channel taxonomy defined
milestones.covers: Agreed channel and subchannel definitions including Branded vs Non-Branded and Pmax classification

milestones.name: Manual spend sources uploaded
milestones.covers: Influencer, podcast, affiliate, agency, and OOH spend entered via Google Sheets template
milestones.deliverable: Consolidation of all marketing spend sources

milestones.name: Marketing budget plan entered
milestones.covers: Annual or quarterly budget by channel and month loaded into the warehouse
milestones.deliverable: Actual spend vs. planned budget view by channel week and month

milestones.name: New vs. returning customer split
milestones.covers: Acquisition metrics separated from returning customer activity

stages.name: Basic Attribution
stages.description: UTM hygiene, web events, and first attribution models — last-click, first-click, and blended CAC.

milestones.name: UTM & campaign naming convention
milestones.covers: Consistent UTM naming convention for source, medium, campaign, and content across all platforms
milestones.deliverable: GSheet template and documentation for UTM naming convention

milestones.name: Web event data collection
milestones.covers: Pageviews, add-to-carts, checkout starts, and purchases captured via Segment or GA4
milestones.deliverable: Web events and conversion dbt models and tables

milestones.name: Event sessionization
milestones.covers: Raw events grouped into sessions with source / medium / campaign assigned

milestones.name: UTM cleaning & classification
milestones.covers: Historical UTM data audited cleaned and reclassified with ongoing compliance monitoring
milestones.deliverable: Cleaned and classified UTM source, medium, and campaign

milestones.name: Last-click attribution model
milestones.covers: Spend divided by last-touch new subscribers by channel updated daily
milestones.deliverable: Blended CAC, last-click ROAS, CVR, and new customer acquisition dashboard

milestones.name: First-click attribution model
milestones.covers: Where customers first discovered the brand with first-touch CAC alongside last-click
milestones.deliverable: First-click marketing performance dashboard with Blended CAC, ROAS, CVR

milestones.name: Blended CAC trend reporting
milestones.covers: Blended and channel CAC ranges based on Last Click, First Click, and platform performance consolidated

milestones.name: Period over period performance view
milestones.covers: WoW, MoM, and YoY comparisons for ROAS, CAC, and new customer acquisition

stages.name: Budget Tracking
stages.description: Link spend to outcomes. Data-driven CAC targets, live pacing dashboards, and scenario modeling.

milestones.name: CAC targets by channel
milestones.covers: Target CAC per channel derived from LTV cohorts and payback period goals

milestones.name: Budget pacing dashboard
milestones.covers: Actual spend vs. plan by channel, week, and month with over/under flags

milestones.name: Scenario modeling (budget what-if)
milestones.covers: Model-driven what-if analysis for CAC and subscriber volume impact of budget changes

stages.name: Channel Specific
stages.description: Deep attribution by channel type — partnerships, creative performance, landing pages, and product.

milestones.name: Partnership performance dashboard
milestones.covers: Affiliate and influencer performance including UTM tracking, promo code performance, and partner leaderboard

milestones.name: Creative performance attribution
milestones.covers: CAC and ROAS broken down to the ad creative level

milestones.name: Landing page performance dashboard
milestones.covers: Conversion performance tracking for internal and external landing pages

milestones.name: Product acquisition performance
milestones.covers: Marketing spend classified by product with product-based CAC performance
milestones.deliverable: Product Acquisition Attribution model, Product Acquisition Performance dashboard

stages.name: Enhanced Attribution
stages.description: Promo codes, post-purchase surveys, identity resolution, and LTV-weighted attribution models.

milestones.name: Promo code tracking
milestones.covers: Every promo code mapped to its campaign channel and partner with orders tagged at checkout

milestones.name: Post-purchase survey deployed
milestones.covers: PMF/Fairing/Enquire survey live at order confirmation capturing how customers heard about the brand

milestones.name: Survey response classification
milestones.covers: Open-text survey responses categorized into channel taxonomy updated weekly

milestones.name: Landing pages & referrers classification
milestones.covers: Landing pages and URL referrers classified to enhance attribution when UTMs are unavailable
milestones.deliverable: Enhanced Last Click and First Touch with landings and referrers

milestones.name: Identity resolution
milestones.covers: Anonymous visitor IDs stitched to known customer IDs at conversion

milestones.name: Enhanced last-click attribution
milestones.covers: Blended model weighting platform data, promo code signal, and PMF survey into adjusted CAC per channel

milestones.name: Position-based attribution model
milestones.covers: Credit distributed across all touches in the journey using position-based (40/20/40) weighting

milestones.name: Audience segment CAC
milestones.covers: Prospecting vs. retargeting vs. lookalike CAC broken out

milestones.name: Enhanced blended CAC reporting
milestones.covers: Total marketing spend divided by total new subscribers including all paid, influencer, agency, and overhead costs
milestones.deliverable: Updated CAC Performance dashboard with enhanced and new attribution models

milestones.name: CAC:LTV by channel
milestones.covers: LTV cohorts joined to channel-level CAC updated monthly to feed media mix decisions
milestones.deliverable: CAC vs LTV dashboard, LTV-informed channel mix

stages.name: Signal Engineering
stages.description: Server-side events, CAPI, enhanced conversions, customer list syncs, and LTV-weighted bidding.

milestones.name: Pixel tracking audit
milestones.covers: Validate all pixels are firing correctly, validate event firing on website funnels, Meta EMQ audit
milestones.deliverable: Website tracking audit, website funnel dashboard

milestones.name: Conversion API (Meta & TikTok)
milestones.covers: Server-side purchase events sent directly to Meta and TikTok APIs bypassing iOS14+ signal loss
milestones.deliverable: CAPI implementation for Meta and TikTok

milestones.name: Google Enhanced Conversions
milestones.covers: Hashed customer email/phone sent back to Google Ads at conversion

milestones.name: Offline conversion uploads
milestones.covers: Subscription activations, renewals, and LTV milestones pushed to platforms as custom offline events

milestones.name: Customer list syncs
milestones.covers: Active, lapsed, and high-LTV subscriber segments synced to platforms on a regular schedule

milestones.name: LTV-weighted bidding signals
milestones.covers: Predicted LTV sent to platforms at conversion to enable value-based bidding

milestones.name: Event deduplication
milestones.covers: Server-side and browser-side events deduplicated using event_id

milestones.name: Signal quality monitoring
milestones.covers: Match rates, event volume, and deduplication rates tracked weekly with degradation alerts

stages.name: Channel Testing
stages.description: Holdout methodology, incrementality tests, and geo experiments to measure true lift per channel.

milestones.name: Holdout test framework
milestones.covers: Methodology defined for control cell size, randomization, minimum detectable effect, and test duration

milestones.name: Incrementality tests
milestones.covers: Audience held back from campaigns to measure incremental new subscriber lift

milestones.name: Geo-based channel experiments
milestones.covers: Channel paused or increased in specific markets with pre/post subscriber volume compared

milestones.name: Podcast & influencer measurement
milestones.covers: Unique URLs, promo codes, and branded search lift tracked per partner placement

milestones.name: OOH / linear TV measurement
milestones.covers: Geo-level lift analysis comparing exposed and unexposed markets for offline media

milestones.name: Test results → attribution weights
milestones.covers: Incrementality findings update channel weights in the attribution model
milestones.deliverable: Updated attribution model with incrementality weights

milestones.name: Ongoing test roadmap
milestones.covers: Always-on quarterly experiment calendar with results documented and shared with media team

stages.name: Mix Modeling
stages.description: Bayesian MMM with adstock, diminishing returns curves, and data-driven budget reallocation.

milestones.name: Historical data preparation
milestones.covers: 18-24 months of weekly spend, revenue, new subscribers, and macro variables assembled and cleaned

milestones.name: MMM model build
milestones.covers: Bayesian or ridge regression MMM fitted with response curves and holdout validation

milestones.name: Adstock and lag effects
milestones.covers: Delayed impact of brand spend modeled per channel to capture halo effects

milestones.name: Diminishing returns curves
milestones.covers: Marginal ROAS curve by channel identifying saturation points

milestones.name: Revenue decomposition
milestones.covers: Revenue split into baseline, paid channels, seasonality, and external factors

milestones.name: Budget reallocation recs.
milestones.covers: Optimization output from MMM recommending channel mix to maximize new subscribers at same budget

milestones.name: MMM refresh cadence
milestones.covers: Model refitted quarterly with drift monitoring between scheduled refits

milestones.name: MMM × holdout validation
milestones.covers: MMM outputs cross-validated against holdout test results with discrepancies investigated

stages.name: Self-Optimizing
stages.description: Triangulated attribution and a self-optimizing feedback loop across all models.

milestones.name: Triangulated attribution model
milestones.covers: Click-based, impression-based, and incrementality models combined into a final blended attribution
milestones.deliverable: Triangulated Attribution Model, updated CAC tracker view

milestones.name: Self-optimizing system
milestones.covers: Signal engineering, MMM, incrementality tests, and LTV signals forming a feedback loop
milestones.deliverable: Holistic view of all attribution tools working together

stages.name: Revenue Visibility
stages.description: Gross and net revenue trending by product, SKU, and plan — with period-over-period views and a daily dashboard.

milestones.name: Gross revenue trending
milestones.covers: Gross revenue by day, week, and month with trend lines

milestones.name: Net revenue (after deductions)
milestones.covers: Net revenue after discounts, refunds, returns, and chargebacks with gross vs. net delta

milestones.name: Revenue by product, SKU & plan
milestones.covers: Revenue broken down by product line, SKU, and subscription plan

milestones.name: New vs. recurring revenue split
milestones.covers: First-order revenue separated from subscription renewal revenue

milestones.name: Period over period comparisons
milestones.covers: WoW, MoM, and YoY comparisons for all core revenue metrics with seasonality-adjusted growth

milestones.name: Data For Every Day dashboard
milestones.covers: Single daily-refreshed dashboard with gross revenue, net revenue, new subscribers, orders, AOV, refunds, and churn

stages.name: Targets & Planning
stages.description: Annual and quarterly targets set by channel and day, aligned with the marketing budget plan.

milestones.name: Commercial target creation
milestones.covers: Annual and quarterly revenue targets set by channel and day with documented methodology

milestones.name: Targets broken down by days
milestones.covers: Annual target decomposed into daily, weekly, and monthly milestones accounting for seasonality and planned campaigns

milestones.name: Targets aligned with marketing budget
milestones.covers: Revenue targets explicitly tied to planned marketing spend so changes in spend cascade through to targets
milestones.deliverable: Aligned Marketing budget with Commercial Targets

stages.name: Pacing & Actuals
stages.description: Live revenue and marketing spend pacing vs. targets — refreshed daily with over/under flags.

milestones.name: Revenue pacing dashboard
milestones.covers: Actuals vs. weekly and monthly target with current trajectory projected to month-end and quarter-end, refreshed daily

milestones.name: Marketing pacing dashboard
milestones.covers: Actual marketing spend vs. budget by channel tied to the revenue pacing view

stages.name: Business Reviews
stages.description: Automated WBR, MBR, and an always-on business health panel for leadership.

milestones.name: WBR — weekly business review
milestones.covers: Automated weekly report covering revenue, pacing, marketing spend, subscriber net adds, product flags, wins, and risks

milestones.name: MBR — monthly business review
milestones.covers: Deeper monthly review including full P&L actuals, cohort performance, channel efficiency, and forward outlook

milestones.name: Business Health Panel
milestones.covers: Always-on live view of 10-12 core metrics: MRR, pacing, new subs, churn, blended CAC, AOV, contribution margin, NRR

stages.name: Forecasting
stages.description: Dynamic forward projections blending trends, cohort curves, spend, and billing schedules.

milestones.name: Trend-based forecast
milestones.covers: Dynamic forward projection blending revenue trends, cohort retention, planned spend, and calendar events updated weekly

milestones.name: New subscriber acquisition forecast
milestones.covers: Forward projection of new subscriber volume based on planned marketing spend by channel and historical CAC

milestones.name: Subscription revenue forecast (deterministic)
milestones.covers: Billing calendar model: active subscribers x billing cadence x AOV projected 30/60/90 days forward, accurate within 3-5%

milestones.name: Pacing vs. forecast dashboard
milestones.covers: Actuals compared against both static annual target and dynamic forecast simultaneously with three-line view

stages.name: Cost Foundation
stages.description: Fully landed COGS, fulfillment costs, returns tracking, and contribution margin at SKU level.

milestones.name: Fully landed COGS by product & SKU
milestones.covers: Landed COGS at the SKU level including unit cost, inbound freight, and duties

milestones.name: Fulfillment cost per order
milestones.covers: Total fulfillment cost per order (pick & pack, freight, 3PL fees) by carrier, region, service level, and box size

milestones.name: Returns cost tracking
milestones.covers: Return rate per SKU plus cost to process each return, tracked as % of revenue monthly

milestones.name: Gross & contribution margin
milestones.covers: Gross Margin and Contribution Margin added to metric catalogue and LTV, broken down across all key dimensions
milestones.deliverable: Gross Margin and Contribution Margin visibility

stages.name: Unit Economics
stages.description: Profitability trending, discount depth analysis, and margin impact by campaign and segment.

milestones.name: Profitability % trending
milestones.covers: Gross margin percentage tracked monthly to detect input cost creep and product mix shifts

milestones.name: Discount depth analysis
milestones.covers: Average discount % by campaign, channel, and segment with impact on contribution margin quantified

stages.name: P&L
stages.description: Full P&L dashboard from revenue to EBITDA, actuals vs. targets, and subscriber-level P&L.

milestones.name: Full P&L dashboard
milestones.covers: Revenue, COGS, gross margin, contribution margin, opex, and EBITDA updated weekly
milestones.deliverable: P&L visibility including GM, NMV, and Contribution Margin

milestones.name: P&L actuals vs. targets
milestones.covers: Every P&L line compared against annual budget plan with variance in dollars and %

milestones.name: Subscriber P&L
milestones.covers: Revenue minus all variable costs per subscriber over their lifetime

stages.name: CAC & Payback
stages.description: Fully-loaded CAC, payback period by channel, and LTV:CAC ratios by cohort.

milestones.name: Fully-loaded CAC
milestones.covers: Total acquisition cost including all marketing spend, agency fees, creative, tools, and headcount

milestones.name: Payback period by channel
milestones.covers: Months to recover acquisition cost from contribution margin per subscriber, by channel

milestones.name: LTV:CAC ratio by channel & cohort
milestones.covers: LTV cohorts joined to channel-level CAC with >3:1 ratio as DTC scaling threshold, tracked by channel and cohort

stages.name: Merchandise Performance
stages.description: SKU-level basket mix, merchandise dashboard, NPS by product, return reasons, reorder rate, and health score.

milestones.name: Product basket mix
milestones.covers: Products frequently purchased together analyzed excluding marketing and promotion effects

milestones.name: Merchandise performance dashboard
milestones.covers: Revenue by SKU and category with PoP performance, Gross Margin, acquisition performance, and web CVR

milestones.name: Review & NPS mentions by SKU
milestones.covers: Star ratings and review text from all channels joined to SKU-level data, trended monthly

milestones.name: Returns reason & CS ticket volume by product
milestones.covers: Structured return reason codes and support ticket volume per SKU with theme classification and early warning alerts

milestones.name: Reorder rate by product
milestones.covers: % of customers who specifically reorder the same SKU in subsequent orders

milestones.name: Product health score (0–100)
milestones.covers: Composite score per SKU combining sales velocity, returns rate, review score, NPS sentiment, CS ticket rate, and reorder rate

stages.name: Fulfillment Visibility
stages.description: Order volume, fulfillment cost, shipping zones, carrier performance, and a daily ops dashboard.

milestones.name: Orders shipped by day, week & month
milestones.covers: Total order volume shipped by region, carrier, and service level

milestones.name: Fulfillment cost per order
milestones.covers: Total fulfillment cost per order (pick & pack, freight, 3PL fees) by carrier, region, service level, and box size

milestones.name: Shipping zone distribution
milestones.covers: % of orders shipping to each carrier zone to understand freight cost drivers

milestones.name: Carrier performance breakdown
milestones.covers: On-time delivery rate, damage rate, and lost-in-transit rate by carrier

milestones.name: On-time delivery rate (top-level)
milestones.covers: % of orders delivered within the promised window, tracked daily

milestones.name: Operations weekly dashboard
milestones.covers: OTIF rate, orders shipped, fulfillment cost, inventory alerts, quality complaint count, and return volume

stages.name: Inventory Visibility
stages.description: SKU-level on-hand counts, weeks on hand, availability %, inventory value, low-stock alerts, and dead stock flags.

milestones.name: SKU-level inventory on hand
milestones.covers: Current inventory count per SKU updated daily from 3PL WMS feed

milestones.name: Weeks on hand by SKU
milestones.covers: Current inventory divided by average weekly consumption rate per SKU

milestones.name: Inventory availability %
milestones.covers: Inventory availability rate per SKU to flag coverage gaps

milestones.name: Inventory value on hand
milestones.covers: Inventory at cost by SKU and in total to track working capital

milestones.name: Low stock alerts
milestones.covers: Automated flag when a SKU falls below its reorder threshold with on-hand, consumption rate, and days until stockout
milestones.deliverable: Low stock alerts based on forecast

milestones.name: Dead stock identification
milestones.covers: SKUs with zero or near-zero velocity over trailing 60/90 days flagged for markdown or discontinuation

stages.name: OTIF & Quality
stages.description: On-time, in-full delivery rate broken down by carrier, SKU, damage, lost-in-transit, order accuracy, and customer-reported issues.

milestones.name: OTIF rate
milestones.covers: On-time, in-full delivery rate by carrier, region, and 3PL facility against a >95% DTC benchmark

milestones.name: On-time rate by carrier
milestones.covers: On-time delivery % per carrier to identify underperformance and enable SLA renegotiation

milestones.name: In-full rate by SKU
milestones.covers: % of orders shipped complete per SKU to surface inventory planning gaps or 3PL pick errors

milestones.name: Damage rate by carrier & route
milestones.covers: % of orders damaged by carrier, route, and packaging configuration

milestones.name: Lost in transit rate
milestones.covers: % of shipments lost by carrier, region, and service level with cost impact tracked

milestones.name: Order accuracy rate
milestones.covers: % of orders shipped with the correct item quantity and address

milestones.name: Customer-reported fulfillment issues
milestones.covers: CS tickets and reviews citing fulfillment problems tagged and trended separately from product quality issues

stages.name: Returns & Reverse Logistics
stages.description: Return volume, return rate by SKU, restockable vs. write-off splits, net inventory impact, and quality complaint tracking.

milestones.name: Return volume by SKU, region & reason
milestones.covers: Total returns by product, geography, and structured reason codes

milestones.name: Return rate by SKU
milestones.covers: Return rate per SKU as % of units shipped with automatic flag when exceeding category average

milestones.name: Restockable vs. non-restockable returns
milestones.covers: % of returned units recoverable as sellable inventory vs. written off

milestones.name: Net return impact on inventory
milestones.covers: How much returned stock is recovered as sellable inventory each week to feed inventory planning

milestones.name: Product quality complaints
milestones.covers: Complaints citing product quality by SKU, trended weekly, with root cause categorization

stages.name: Vendor & Supplier Performance
stages.description: Supplier on-time delivery, fill rate, lead time variance, cost variance, quality rejection, concentration risk, and supplier scorecard.

milestones.name: Supplier on-time delivery rate
milestones.covers: % of POs delivered on or before the requested delivery date per supplier

milestones.name: Supplier fill rate
milestones.covers: Units received vs. units ordered per PO and per supplier

milestones.name: Lead time by supplier
milestones.covers: Average lead time and variance per supplier quantified as standard deviation

milestones.name: Cost variance by supplier
milestones.covers: Actual invoice cost vs. PO cost per supplier trended to catch creeping price increases

milestones.name: Quality rejection rate
milestones.covers: % of units rejected at receiving due to quality issues per supplier

milestones.name: Supplier concentration risk
milestones.covers: % of total COGS sourced from each supplier with single-supplier dependency flags

milestones.name: Supplier scorecard
milestones.covers: Composite monthly scorecard per supplier: on-time delivery, fill rate, quality rejection, cost variance

milestones.name: 3PL performance scorecard
milestones.covers: Monthly scorecard per 3PL: OTIF rate, order accuracy, cost vs. contract, quality complaint rate, returns processing time

stages.name: Inventory Planning
stages.description: Consumption rates, reorder points, safety stock models, EOQ optimization, inventory health dashboard, and ops input to WBR/MBR.

milestones.name: Consumption rate by SKU
milestones.covers: Rolling average weekly units consumed per SKU updated continuously

milestones.name: Reorder point calculation
milestones.covers: Reorder point = (average daily consumption x supplier lead time) + safety stock with automatic reorder alert

milestones.name: Safety stock model
milestones.covers: Buffer stock calculated per SKU based on demand variability and lead time variability, calibrated per SKU

milestones.name: Reorder quantity optimization
milestones.covers: EOQ or min/max model per SKU balancing order cost, carrying cost, and stockout risk

milestones.name: Inventory health planning dashboard
milestones.covers: On-hand, weeks on hand, reorder point, reorder quantity recommendation, and next PO due date per SKU

milestones.name: Operations input to WBR/MBR
milestones.covers: OTIF status, stockout risks, quality complaint flags, and fulfillment cost vs. plan fed into Commercial business reviews

stages.name: Baseline Visibility
stages.description: Core subscription health — growth, churn, modifications, and structured cancellation reason tracking.

milestones.name: Subscription growth baseline
milestones.covers: Daily and weekly active subscribers, new activations, cancellations, net change, and gross churn rate by plan and region

milestones.name: Expansion revenue tracking
milestones.covers: Upgrades, frequency increases, and add-on products tracked as Net Revenue Retention (NRR)

milestones.name: Subscription modification tracking
milestones.covers: Frequency changes, downgrades, pauses, and skips logged as events separate from cancellations
milestones.deliverable: Subscription modification tracking dashboard including pauses, skips, and downgrades

milestones.name: Cancellation reason tracking
milestones.covers: Structured cancellation survey categorized and trended weekly

stages.name: Cohort Foundation
stages.description: Retention and LTV curves by cohort, channel, plan, and seasonality — built on daily data models.

milestones.name: Daily subscription & customer data models
milestones.covers: Three data models tracking daily retention activity per subscription subscription line and customer
milestones.deliverable: Daily data models for subscription and customer retention activity

milestones.name: Retention curves by acquisition cohort
milestones.covers: % still active at Month 1, 2, 3, 6, 12, 24 by acquisition month

milestones.name: Retention curves by channel
milestones.covers: Retention curve broken out by acquisition channel

milestones.name: Retention curves by plan / product
milestones.covers: Retention by subscription plan, box size, or product type
milestones.deliverable: Retention dashboard by plan and product

milestones.name: Gift vs. self-purchase segmentation
milestones.covers: Gifted vs. self-purchased subscription retention curves tracked separately
milestones.deliverable: Updated retention dashboard with GWP vs non-GWP segmentation

milestones.name: Seasonal retention pattern analysis
milestones.covers: Cohort curves overlaid by season of acquisition to surface seasonal churn patterns
milestones.deliverable: Updated retention dashboard with seasonal cohorts

milestones.name: Churn curves (time-to-churn)
milestones.covers: At what subscription age do most cancellations happen

milestones.name: LTV by cohort, channel & product
milestones.covers: Cumulative revenue per subscriber by cohort over time, broken out by plan, channel, and product

milestones.name: CAC:LTV and payback period by channel
milestones.covers: Channel-level CAC divided by projected LTV with payback period in months

stages.name: Customer Segmentation
stages.description: Lifecycle stages, CRM engagement tiers, LRFM scoring, and high-LTV segment identification.

milestones.name: Lifecycle stage definition
milestones.covers: Formalized Active, At-Risk, Lapsing, and Churned definitions calibrated to brand's purchase cadence

milestones.name: CRM engagement level segmentation
milestones.covers: Subscribers classified by email/SMS engagement as Active Passive or Inactive

milestones.name: Cross-segmentation: lifecycle × CRM
milestones.covers: Subscribers bucketed across both purchase lifecycle and CRM engagement dimensions

milestones.name: LRFM scoring
milestones.covers: Recency, Frequency, Monetary, and Loyalty scored 1-5 per subscriber refreshed weekly

milestones.name: High-LTV segment identification
milestones.covers: Top decile subscribers by actual or projected LTV identified and tracked separately

milestones.name: Customer segmentation snapshots
milestones.covers: Every subscriber classified into lifecycle stage monthly stored as a slowly changing dimension

stages.name: CRM & Lifecycle Activation
stages.description: Automated flows, win-back programs, cancellation intervention, NPS, and voice of customer.

milestones.name: CRM performance measurement
milestones.covers: Flow-level metrics tied to retention outcomes: revenue per recipient, click-to-reactivation, churn rescue rate

milestones.name: Frequency mismatch detection
milestones.covers: Customers with high skip rates flagged and triggered into proactive frequency-change offer
milestones.deliverable: Frequency mismatch analysis and intervention flow

milestones.name: Segment-triggered CRM flows
milestones.covers: Automated email/SMS flows triggered by lifecycle stage transitions: welcome, at-risk, lapsing, win-back
milestones.deliverable: Customer segment data fed to CRM

milestones.name: OTP to subscriber nurture
milestones.covers: Onboarding and engagement program for OTP customers who haven't yet subscribed
milestones.deliverable: Customer segment data fed to CRM

milestones.name: Win-back program (lapsed subscribers)
milestones.covers: Structured reactivation program with timing, offer sequencing, and suppression rules tracked by cohort

milestones.name: Cancellation flow optimization
milestones.covers: Pause, frequency-change, and discount offers presented before cancellation with reason captured
milestones.deliverable: Cancellation flow analysis and CRM flow

milestones.name: Reactivation & win-back tracking
milestones.covers: Cancelled subscribers who reactivated tracked by volume, time-to-reactivation, and channel

milestones.name: NPS & CSAT program
milestones.covers: Structured NPS surveys at key lifecycle moments joined to cohort data

milestones.name: NPS analytics by segment
milestones.covers: NPS broken out by lifecycle stage, acquisition channel, product, and tenure

milestones.name: Voice of customer synthesis
milestones.covers: Qualitative signals from reviews, tickets, surveys, and social mentions categorized and quantified

stages.name: Predictive Retention
stages.description: ML churn scoring, reactivation propensity, upgrade propensity, and LTV prediction models.

milestones.name: Churn risk scoring model
milestones.covers: ML model scoring every active subscriber on 30/60/90-day churn probability using behavioral signals
milestones.deliverable: Churn probability score per customer, churn analysis

milestones.name: Churn score → CRM activation
milestones.covers: High churn probability scores automatically surface subscribers into intervention CRM flows
milestones.deliverable: CRM flow for high-churn-probability customers, early warning dashboard

milestones.name: Reactivation propensity model
milestones.covers: Churned subscribers scored on likelihood to reactivate to prioritize win-back budget

milestones.name: Propensity-to-upgrade model
milestones.covers: Subscribers scored on likelihood to upgrade plan, increase frequency, or add a product
milestones.deliverable: Upsell dashboard showing customers and products for targeted offers

milestones.name: LTV prediction model
milestones.covers: Predicted remaining LTV per subscriber based on cohort curve, tenure, engagement signals, and product mix

stages.name: Personalization & Growth
stages.description: Product recommendations, data-derived personas, subscriber P&L, and loyalty program analytics.

milestones.name: Next-best-product recommendation
milestones.covers: Collaborative filtering or association rules model recommending the most likely next product per subscriber
milestones.deliverable: Async recommendation per customer and CRM flow

milestones.name: Recommendation engine — onsite
milestones.covers: Real-time product recommendations on site, post-checkout, and account portal

milestones.name: Social proof personalization
milestones.covers: Subscribers shown content and reviews from similar segments to increase product discovery
milestones.deliverable: Personalized social media reviews on website

milestones.name: Persona development
milestones.covers: Data-derived subscriber personas based on purchase behavior, product preferences, tenure, LTV, and acquisition source (4-6 personas)

milestones.name: Testimonial propensity model
milestones.covers: Subscribers most likely to leave a testimonial or refer scored and targeted

milestones.name: Subscriber P&L by segment
milestones.covers: Fully-loaded P&L per subscriber segment: revenue, COGS, fulfillment, CRM cost, and predicted LTV

milestones.name: Loyalty program analytics
milestones.covers: Points earned vs. redeemed, redemption impact on retention rate, and incremental LTV from loyalty mechanics
